name: Fury!
short_description: A sci-fi action arcade run-and-gun game.
detailed_description:
Time to SAVE THE GALAXY one more time against the scourge of an evil alien presence so foul they make doom baddies look like a church choir. Fury takes place in an abandoned space station on the edge of our known galaxy. It’s infested by evil robots programmed to destroy any humans that dare enter. Controlled by a creature so evil merely looking at it made Kevin lose his lunch. Are you up to the task??

Fury is an arcade shooter that pays homage to the games we all loved from the past. It features a unique design with familiar game mechanics. It’s a classic run and gun with enemies using varying strategies to eliminate the player.

Features:
• Walls can reflect hits, and some walls can be destroyed
• Multiple power-ups
• Some machines can be destroyed and may impact robots
• Achievements
• World-wide leaderboard ranking
• Multiple paths for replay ability
• Over-the-top narration by the Game Master
• All original soundtrack

If you’re strong enough to survive the onslaught and kill the boss, your job is not over.

Do you think you have what it takes? 

Update 12.11.24 - Achievements added!
Update 12.14.24 - Leaderboard added!
